# cad/schematic/

Auto-generated by `/generate-schematic` — do not edit manually.
All `.py` files in this directory are replaced entirely each time the skill runs.

Run `/generate-schematic` to populate.

## Generated Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `schematic.py` | Orchestrator — reads layout_spec.yaml, calls block placers, saves .kicad_sch |
| `sch_helpers.py` | Pin offsets, wiring utilities, power/label stub helpers |
| `sch_power.py` | Power input block (screw terminal, polyfuse, reverse polarity, bulk caps) |
| `sch_mcu.py` | MCU/processor connector block |
| `sch_comms.py` | Communication blocks (UART, RS-485, USB, CAN, etc.) |
| `sch_io.py` | I/O header blocks (I2C, SPI, GPIO, decoupling) |
